arts.ttl: Barcelona star admits he ‘really likes’ Atlético Madrid boss Simeone
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has this weekend provided an insight into his appreciation for the managerial talents of Atlético Madrid head coach Diego Simeone. Gavi and Simeone, of course, are set…

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid president furious with VAR after disallowed Julian Alvarez penalty
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are still reeling from their heartbreaking Champions League exit at the hands of Real Madrid on Wednesday. They bowed out of the competition after a 4-2 penalty shoot-out defeat that had lots of controversy, with the big moment seeing Julian Alvarez’s successful effort ruled out by VAR for a double-touch. arts.ttl: Arsenal plot summer move for 21-year-old wide player who rejected Barcelona
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keen on signing the Espanyol right back Omar El Hilali. The 21-year-old has been quite impressive in La Liga and his performances have attracted the attention of the North London club according to a report from the Sun. The player has previously admitted to rejecting Barcelona and it will be interesting to […] The post Arsenal plot summer move for 21-year-old wide player who rejected Barcelona appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Barcelona drawing up plan to land Liverpool star this summer
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have begun putting a roadmap in place towards the signing of a leading member of the attacking ranks at Liverpool. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: ‘I have to score more’ - Balde eager to improve at Barca
arts.sum: Alejandro Balde is in the midst of a superb season for Barcelona and has been starring for Hansi Flick’s side at left-back. The 21-year-old is one of a host of players who are thriving under the German coach but he says there’s still one area of his game he wants to improve.

arts.ttl: Report: Atletico Madrid join race to sign Man United target with 18 G/A this season
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid and Manchester United are set to battle it out for one of the best strikers in the Premier League. Both the clubs are looking for new options in attack as Antoine Griezmann is likely to leave the club at the end of the season due to his contract expiring in 2026. While both […] The post Report: Atletico Madrid join race to sign Man United target with 18 G/A this season appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: One drops out as Barcelona name squad to face Atlético
arts.sum: The squad of players called upon by Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick to face Atlético Madrid later today has been unveiled online. And it features one altogether noteworthy omission. Barcelona…

Diego Simeone's side are just a point behind Hansi Flick's team in the table and have played a game more the game in Madrid is a chance for the home side to get themselves back into the title race. Sunday, 9pm CET, at the Metropolitano Stadium Atlético Madrid host FC Barcelona in what could turn out to be a decisive encounter regarding the destination of the La Liga title this season.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Atletico Madrid-Barcelona: Hansi Flick goes all out at the Metropolitano
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s victory on Saturday saw them go top of La Liga, but Barcelona will be aiming to take their place back 24 hours later as they prepare to take on Atletico Madrid in a top of the table clash at the Metropolitano. arts.ttl: How Barca & Raphinha are leading the sprint race in La Liga
arts.sum: The brilliant Brazilian boasts a total of 990 high speed sprints in La Liga so far this season - that’s an average of 38.08 per game and an increase of 23.79 from last year. A deeper look shows Barça average 264.3 high-speed sprints per game.
